applock.title: Bar the Gates
applock.desc: Lock the work with a watchword

biometrics.title: Use thy Body
biometrics.desc: Unbar via thy finger or face

allowRemoteContent.title: Allow the World In
allowRemoteContent.desc: Allow Ampersand to reach the world for images and visages.

passwordAlert.text: Art thou sure? Write thy watchword elsewhere, for if it be lost, thy lore is lost forever. Send away thy lore ere thou settest a watchword!
